tooltip.templenihility.nihility_shard: Base material: a formless fragment shed from absence, used in trades, tools, and early rituals.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_crystal: Void material: a stabilized spatial crystal for vaults, teleportation, gravity, and void logistics.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_dust: Nihility material: dust reduced to nothingness, suited to purification, repair, and Formless Power recipes.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_rune: Temple material: a rune carved with nullifying law, used in altar structures and advanced crafting.
tooltip.templenihility.temple_seal: Advanced ritual material: seals a fragment of absence-law, often used for core blocks and armor upgrades.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_core: Core material: the true nihility core, the axis of later nihility and formless abilities.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_relic_fr: Abyss relic material: a soul-flame echo fragment for revival, siphoning, and abyssal trades.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_resonanc: Chaos material: an unstable resonance core for amplification, disturbance, and risky upgrades.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_1: Large void-storage block: each vault adds 243 slots
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_2: Adjacent vaults automatically merge into one Void Vault network with no hardcoded cap
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_3: Right click to open the Void Terminal. Break protection is enabled by default; disable it before mining.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_altar_1: Formless ritual core: right click to open the altar screen
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_altar_2: Tier 1: place Temple Rune Bricks on four sides; tier 2: add Void Crystal Blocks on four corners
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_altar_3: Tier 3: add Temple Pillars two blocks out and Chiseled Silent Stone on the outer corners
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_ex: Use on a Void Vault: adds 243 slots per upgrade, up to 3 upgrades per vault
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Curios accessory: a void moving light source that illuminates real blocks around you
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Curios accessory: abyssal emergency revival, granting recovery and absorption at low health
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_shadow_s: Consumed on use: Fade into Nihility. You cannot be selected, ignore damage, fly, and phase through blocks. Attacking breaks it.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_purifyin: Uses durability: nullifies harmful effects, restores you, and knocks hostile threats away
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Uses durability: opens void echoes, grants night vision, and marks and weakens nearby beings
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Uses durability: deploys a formless barrier, granting protection and pushing nearby threats away
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_phase_fe: Uses durability: Melt into Nihility. You briefly phase, fly, and ignore damage until the timer ends.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_gravity_: Uses durability: creates an 8s void gravity field ahead of your crosshair, pulling non-player creatures within 10 blocks
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_war_horn: Uses durability: sounds an abyssal war horn, empowering you and weakening nearby enemies
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_soul_fla: Consumed on use: drinks abyssal soul essence to restore health and grant regeneration and absorption
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_null_scr: Consumed on use: clears harmful effects and grants brief resistance and fire resistance
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_stasis_w: Uses durability: creates a void stasis field that freezes nearby non-player movement
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_rift_sna: Uses durability: releases a void rift pull, gathering and marking nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_abyssal_: Uses durability: sounds the abyssal drum, empowering you and weakening nearby enemies
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_void_bea: Uses durability: lights a void beacon, granting exploration buffs and marking distant creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_terminal: Curios Void Terminal: equip in common Curios slots and press O to open the bound vault network
Hold it and sneak-right-click a Void Vault to bind
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_ring: Curios ring: chaos blood amplification, +4 max health
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_amulet: Curios necklace: void adaptation, night vision and underwater resilience
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_belt: Curios belt: voidwalker movement speed and step height
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_cloak: Curios back slot: void cloak, slow falling and reduced fall damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_magnet: Curios charm: void magnetism pulls up to 48 dropped items within 8 blocks, then picks them up at close range
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_regenera: Curios ring: abyssal regeneration, slowly heals you when hurt and raises max absorption
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_miner_ch: Curios charm: void mining efficiency and block break speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_ward: Curios charm: formless ward with armor, knockback resistance, and periodic resistance
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_gauntlet: Curios hands slot: chaos melee amplification, increasing attack damage and speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_hourglas: Curios charm/belt: void timeflow periodically grants haste and speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_soul_anc: Curios charm/necklace: abyssal soul anchor triggers a brief shield, resistance, and recovery at critical health
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_rift_rin: Curios ring: void rift melee, increasing attack damage and speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_eclipse_: Curios necklace: formless eclipse; night vision, and sneaking grants Hidden in Nihility against environmental damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_aegis_ch: Curios charm: formless aegis with armor, knockback resistance, and emergency resistance
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_wayfinde: Curios charm/belt: void wayfinding, periodic speed and luck for exploration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_star_com: Curios charm/necklace: void star map periodically marks nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_crown: Curios head slot: chaos crown with max health and luck, plus emergency resistance and recovery
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_abyss_ma: Curios back slot: slow falling, fire resistance, and greatly reduced fall damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_siphon_r: Curios ring: abyssal siphon, attack damage and max absorption with slow self-healing when hurt
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_pearl_be: Curios belt: void pearl movement speed, step height, and periodic jump boost
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_sentinel: Curios charm: void sentinel that periodically marks and weakens nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_trader_s: Curios charm: chaos trader seal, luck bonus for trading and rare exploration rewards
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_armor_se: Wearing all four pieces draws 1 energy per second from absence, up to 100. Attacks consume 1 energy and have a 25% chance to be dodged.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_armor_po: Current Formless Power: %s/%s. Full set auto-repairs damaged nihility gear.
message.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Void lantern lit: the moving light is following you
message.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Abyssal recovery orb released: short protection granted
message.templenihility.nihility_soul_anc: Abyssal soul anchor triggered: emergency protection is active
message.templenihility.nihility_aegis_ch: Formless aegis triggered: temporary resistance deployed
message.templenihility.nihility_crown: Chaos crown triggered: chaotic force is flowing back
message.templenihility.nihility_shadow_s: Nihility shadow sigil activated: attacking will break Fade into Nihility
message.templenihility.nihility_purifyin: Nullifying purity bell rings: harmful effects fade
message.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Void echo lens opened: nearby beings are marked
message.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Formless barrier core deployed: short protection active
message.templenihility.nihility_phase_fe: Nihility phase feather opened: you melt into nihility until the timer ends
message.templenihility.nihility_gravity_: Void gravity field opened: space ahead begins to collapse
message.templenihility.nihility_war_horn: Abyssal war horn sounded: battle echoes empower you
message.templenihility.nihility_soul_fla: Abyssal soul flask consumed: life flows back
message.templenihility.nihility_null_scr: Null scroll opened: harmful effects are swallowed
message.templenihility.nihility_stasis_w: Void stasis watch turned: time thickens nearby
message.templenihility.nihility_rift_sna: Void rift snare released: enemies are pulled toward the rift
message.templenihility.nihility_abyssal_: Abyssal drum sounded: abyssal battle will spreads
message.templenihility.nihility_void_bea: Void beacon lit: distant echoes are marked
message.templenihility.item_cooldown: This item is still cooling down
message.templenihility.item_no_targets: No valid targets in range; item was not consumed
message.templenihility.void_power_dodge: Formless Power dodged the attack. Energy left: %s/%s
message.templenihility.trade_success: Trade complete: paid %s x %s and received %s x %s
message.templenihility.trade_need_more: Not enough materials: this trade needs at least %s x %s
message.templenihility.trade_wrong_item: This abyssal creature does not accept that item. Use Formless Fragments or Voidform Crystals.
message.templenihility.trade_cooldown: Trade cooling down: try again in about %s seconds
message.templenihility.terminal_unbound: Void Terminal is unbound: hold it and sneak-right-click a Void Vault
message.templenihility.terminal_missing: You need to carry or wear a Void Terminal
message.templenihility.terminal_wrong_di: The bound vault is in another dimension
message.templenihility.vault_not_found: Bound Void Vault was not found; it may be unloaded or broken
message.templenihility.vault_open_failed: Failed to open the Void Vault. Fully restart the game before testing a newly deployed mod jar.
message.templenihility.vault_chunkload_o: Void Vault network chunk loading enabled for %s vaults
Void Vault network chunk loading disabled for %s vaults
message.templenihility.vault_protection_: Void Vault break protection enabled for %s vaults
Void Vault break protection disabled for %s vaults; they can now be mined
message.templenihility.vault_break_prote: Void Vault is protected. To mine it, disable Protection in the vault terminal.
message.templenihility.vault_upgrade_suc: Void Vault expanded: level %s, current capacity %s slots
message.templenihility.vault_upgrade_max: This Void Vault is already at the expansion cap: level %s
message.templenihility.altar_no_input: The Formless Altar needs a material first
message.templenihility.altar_no_recipe: The Formless Altar does not recognize this material
message.templenihility.altar_not_enough: Not enough material: at least %s x %s required
message.templenihility.altar_structure_t: Altar structure is too weak: requires %s
message.templenihility.altar_output_bloc: The altar output slot is full
message.templenihility.help_vault: §7Void Vault: right-click a vault to open the terminal. Adjacent vaults merge; each vault adds 243 slots.
message.templenihility.help_terminal: §7Void Terminal: hold it and sneak-right-click a vault to bind; then press O or use /nihility terminal.
message.templenihility.help_chunkload: §7Chunk loading: open a Void Vault or Void Terminal, then click the Chunk Load button.
screen.templenihility.confirm_disable_ch: When disabled, the vault network chunks may stop ticking after you leave the area. Storage is safe, but remote access and automation may pause.
screen.templenihility.vault_stats: Network: %s vaults, %s slots; drag JEI items to search
screen.templenihility.sort_tip: Cycle sorting: position, name, count, or mod
screen.templenihility.chunkload_tip: Keeps vault chunks ticking; disabling asks for confirmation
screen.templenihility.protection_tip: Prevents accidental vault breaking; disable it before removing vaults
screen.templenihility.terminal_help_tip: Void Vault terminal: search, sort, remote transfer, crafting, and vault settings live here.
screen.templenihility.storage_tip_1: Vault storage: identical items are merged into one visible slot
screen.templenihility.storage_tip_2: Left/right click to take items. Shift-click inventory items to store them.
screen.templenihility.storage_tip_3: Search by item name or mod id. JEI items can be dragged into the search box.
screen.templenihility.crafting_tip_1: Temporary crafting grid: place materials and take the result on the right.
screen.templenihility.crafting_tip_2: Remaining crafting materials are returned when this screen closes.
screen.templenihility.vault_empty: Vault is empty: shift-click inventory items to store them
screen.templenihility.no_results: No matching items. Try another item name or mod id.
screen.templenihility.altar_button_tip: Run the ritual after placing a material. Missing structure or materials are explained in chat.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_waystone: Right-click to instantly open your activated Waystones list. No hold time, no cooldown.
On successful teleport, spends Formless Power: %s same-dimension, %s cross-dimension.
Canceling the list costs nothing. Void-rift effects play on opening and arrival.
Requires Waystones to be installed. Once present, right-click opens the teleport list.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_power_ch: Curios accessory: raises max Formless Power by 200 and can be recharged by prisms and energy cells.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_conduit_: Curios accessory: raises max Formless Power by 500. Near energy cells, it charges you automatically; sneak to send power back.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_energy_p: Functional block: draws a small amount of Formless Power from absence every second.
Charges nearby valid players and adjacent Formless Energy Cells.
A base power node for vaults, altars, and teleport logistics.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_energy_c: Functional block: stores up to 10000 Formless Power.
Trickles energy back into nearby players and accepts output from adjacent prisms.
A relay reserve for armor, waystone jumps, and altar rituals.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_transpor: Functional block: relays items, fluids, and energy once per second across north-south, east-west, and up-down pairs.
Automatically detects which side can extract and which side can accept. Works with containers, tanks, batteries, and machines.
This first-generation node has no filter/channel GUI yet, but forms the base of the void logistics system.
message.templenihility.not_enough_void_p: Not enough Formless Power: need %s, current %s/%s.
message.templenihility.altar_energy_spen: The altar consumed %s Formless Power. Remaining %s/%s.
message.templenihility.waystone_void_pow: Waystone jump complete: spent %s Formless Power, remaining %s/%s.
message.templenihility.power_charm_equip: Formless Power Mark equipped: max Formless Power increased to %s.
message.templenihility.conduit_charm_equ: Formless Conduit Mark equipped: max Formless Power increased to %s. Stand near energy cells to transfer power.
message.templenihility.transport_core_st: Void Transport Core: last transfer items %s / fluid %s mB / energy %s.
tooltip.templenihility.aspect.nihility: [Nihility] Absolute absence: existence is reduced to nothing, beyond even void-space.
tooltip.templenihility.aspect.void: [Void] Space and domains: teleportation, storage, gravity, and folded distance.
tooltip.templenihility.aspect.chaos: [Chaos] Unstable amplification: flowing color, disorder, chance, and overload.
tooltip.templenihility.aspect.abyss: [Abyss] Dark western arcana: souls, curses, revival, and abyssal battle will.
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_gear: True nihility gear: built around absence and Formless Power, not purple chaos magic.
